# Glean Software Engineer Intern - Design Systems - Summer Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Glean Software Engineer Intern - Design Systems - Summer internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Palo Alto, CA
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Glean
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Glean is offering a Software Engineer Intern - Design Systems - Summer internship position in Palo Alto, CA. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Glean's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Glean interview and increase your chances of success.
